heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to the compact defining the scope of Seminole water rights and their utilization by the tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 100–228, § 7101 Stat. 1560Dec. 31, 1987
